languages.text: "Не вам требовать объяснений, Себериан. Вы сделали то же самое, когда привлекли внимание Тразина к династии".

traits.locale_text: [draft] Говорим, что не ему нас винить. Он причина проблемы по имени Тразин.

languages.text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Не вам требовать объяснений, Себериан. Вы сделали то же самое, когда привлекли внимание Тразина к династии".

traits.locale_text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."
"You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."
"You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."
"You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."

languages.text: «No está en posición de exigir explicaciones, Seberian. Hizo lo mismo cuando atrajo la atención de Trazyn sobre la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «No está en posición de exigir explicaciones, Seberian. Hizo lo mismo cuando atrajo la atención de Trazyn sobre la dinastía».

languages.text: “你没资格要求我解释，塞贝里安。当初你让特拉金第一次注意到这个王朝时，也是这么做的。”
languages.original_text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “你没资格要求我解释，塞贝里安。当初你让特拉金第一次注意到这个王朝时，也是这么做的。”

languages.text: « Vous n'êtes pas en position d'exiger des explications, Seberian. Vous en avez fait autant en attirant l'attention de Trazyn sur la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'êtes pas en position d'exiger des explications, Seberian. Vous en avez fait autant en attirant l'attention de Trazyn sur la dynastie. »

languages.text: "Açıklama talep edecek konumda değilsin Seberian. Sen de Trazyn'in dikkatini hanedanlığa ilk çektiğinde aynısını yapmıştın."
languages.original_text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Açıklama talep edecek konumda değilsin Seberian. Sen de Trazyn'in dikkatini hanedanlığa ilk çektiğinde aynısını yapmıştın."

languages.text: 「説明を求める立場ではない、シベリア。君も最初にトラズンの注意を引きつけた時、同じことをしたではないか。」
languages.original_text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「説明を求める立場ではない、シベリア。君も最初にトラズンの注意を引きつけた時、同じことをしたではないか。」

languages.text: "Ihr seid nicht in der Position, Erklärungen zu verlangen, Seberian. Ihr habt dasselbe getan, als Ihr Trazyn auf die Dynastie aufmerksam gemacht habt."
languages.original_text: "You are in no position to demand explanations, Seberian. You did the same when you first drew Trazyn's attention to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid nicht in der Position, Erklärungen zu verlangen, Seberian. Ihr habt dasselbe getan, als Ihr Trazyn auf die Dynastie aufmerksam gemacht habt."
